meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve no testing knowledge (Intermediate Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no testing knowledge. A Intermediate-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Project Template: Master Testing for Students
content.seo_description: Overcome testing anxiety with the Antigravity project template. A practical guide for students to build robust, production-ready AI apps using Claude Code.
content.answer_block: Testing is the bridge between a prototype and a product. The Antigravity project template automates your test scaffolding, allowing you to focus on logic. By pairing it with Claude Code, you can generate unit tests that evolve alongside your codebase, ensuring your portfolio projects remain stable, scalable, and highly employable.
content.intro:
You’ve spent weeks crafting the perfect AI logic, but your terminal is silent and your confidence is shaky. You know your code works today, but will it break tomorrow when you add that new feature? The gap between a student project and a professional application isn't talent; it's the mastery of testing.

Most developers fear the testing suite because it feels like an insurmountable mountain of boilerplate. But what if the infrastructure was already built for you? The Antigravity project template is your secret weapon, turning the tedious task of validation into a seamless, automated workflow that feels like second nature.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the foundational structure of your project to ensure modularity and testability from line one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project scaffold using the Antigravity base template, ensuring proper directory separation for src and tests.

steps.title: Map Your Core Logic
steps.description: Define the boundaries of your AI functions so Claude Code knows exactly what to inspect.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the core business logic in src/main.ts and identify three critical edge cases that require unit testing.

steps.title: Generate Automated Test Suites
steps.description: Leverage the template to generate high-coverage test files that validate your input/output expectations.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Jest unit tests for the identified logic, utilizing the Antigravity test utility patterns for mocking AI service responses.

steps.title: Continuous Integration Loop
steps.description: Configure the automated runner to execute your tests on every file save, providing instant feedback.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Set up the watch-mode configuration for the test suite, prioritizing fast failure feedback for the core logic module.

steps.title: Refactor for Resilience
steps.description: Use your passing tests as a safety net to refactor and optimize your code for better performance.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the current module to be more asynchronous, ensuring all existing tests pass after the structural changes.

pro_tips: Treat your tests as documentation; write them in plain English before writing the function logic.
Use mock AI responses in your tests to avoid burning API credits during the development phase.
Prioritize 'Happy Path' tests first, but reserve 60% of your time for 'Edge Case' error handling.
Integrate your test coverage report into your GitHub Readme to show recruiters you value quality.
Never merge a feature into your main branch unless the Antigravity test suite returns 100% success.
resources: Clean Code Principles for AI: https://refactoring.guru
content.next_steps: Once your tests are passing, push your project to GitHub and configure a GitHub Action to run the Antigravity test suite automatically on every pull request.
content.conversion_block: You are no longer just a coder; you are an AI engineer who ships reliable, tested software. Stop fearing bugs and start building the future. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
